prompt: Rank these lakes from shallowest to deepest maximum depth

items.name: Lake Erie
items.fact: 64 m deep — shallowest of the Great Lakes

items.name: Lake Victoria
items.fact: 84 m deep — largest tropical lake in the world

items.name: Lake Superior
items.fact: 406 m deep — largest freshwater lake by area
